title: Bad Dreams
description: Adds [Configurable] Nightmares When Sleeping in The Dark.
body:
## **Bad Dreams**
Add **nightmares** and **good dreams** to Minecraft. **Sleep isn't always safe.**

Bad Dreams is a **vanilla-friendly** and **fully configurable** mod that makes sleeping more dynamic.

### **🌙 How It Works**
[Configurable] Low light level (≤ 5): 25% chance to trigger a nightmare

[Configurable] Bright light level (≥ 8): Chance to experience a good dream

### **🛌 Dream Types**
Nightmare – Visual hallucinations and eerie effects

Dangerous Nightmare – Hostile mobs spawn nearby

Good Dream – Wake up with a small reward

### **⚙️ Config Options**
Dream chances

Light thresholds

### **Rewards**

✅ Vanilla Friendly
No new blocks or items. Integrates seamlessly into regular gameplay.

💡 Pro tip: Light up your room before bed—or face the consequences.
